title: Geometric Font 2
description: A sharp, clean remake of the default mojangles font for all resolutions. Also supports Caxton!
body:
![Preview](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/raw/main/images/geofont_preview.gif)
 [![Edge Badge](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/raw/main/images/edge_badge.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/geometric-font-edge) [![Legacy Badge](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/raw/edge/images/legacy_badge.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/geometric-font) [![Caxton Badge](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/raw/edge/images/caxton_badge.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton)


## About
There are a lot of HD font remakes out there, but none that go for a sharper style that (in my opinion) suits vanilla better. Another issue with most other HD fonts is that they use bitmap images, which will look jagged and distorted unless set to a specific GUI scale. That's why this font exists!

**Geometric Font** started out as a custom font dedicated to another resourcepack project -[Dracula Theme](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dracula-theme)- but ended up becoming [its own pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/geometric-font), which is now named GeoFont Legacy.

GeoFont 2 is a completely rebuilt version of the original font with full OpenType support and better consistency. Check the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/geometric-font-2/gallery) for more examples!

#### [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) is highly recommended for crisper font rendering and full italic+bold support! (automatically enabled if installed)

## Resources

- Want to use this font in your own works? See the [license](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/blob/main/LICENSE.md) and dedicated repo for [GeoFont (Typeface)](https://github.com/Xetheon/GeoFont)
- Curious about updates on things I work on or just want to hang out? Join my [Discord!](https://discord.gg/3gtNAQgv2G)
- Interested in other packs I've made? Check out [this list!](https://gist.github.com/Xetheon/c3d677e0762658f8d79cf05e2c6e65ff)
